# BlessMe (Thailand) Co., Ltd.

> BlessMe is a specialty food wholesaler in Bangkok, Thailand, distributing premium popping boba (popping pearls / bursting boba) to cafés, restaurants, dessert brands, and retailers. Products are vegan (seaweed-derived alginate, not gelatin), shelf-stable at room temperature, with a 12-month shelf life, and ship nationwide across Thailand from a Bangkok warehouse.

## Products (6 signature flavors, wholesale ~80–115 THB/pack)

- Barley — roasted Asian barley; toasty, nutty, refined
- Oat — clean plant-forward oat; creamy, mellow, modern
- Red Bean — heritage Asian flavor; sweet, earthy, classic
- Water Chestnut — signature crunch; crisp, cool, clean
- Osmanthus — steeped gold flowers; floral, honeyed, elegant
- Moji Yogurt — rich moji-yogurt core; tangy, creamy-sweet

## Key pages

- Products / home: https://blessmethailand.com/
- How BlessMe works (wholesale framework): https://blessmethailand.com/solutions
- About: https://blessmethailand.com/about
- Journal (specialty food insights): https://blessmethailand.com/blog
- FAQ (pricing, MOQ, shelf life, shipping): https://blessmethailand.com/faq

## Wholesale details

- Vegan & vegetarian: yes, all six flavors
- Shelf life: 12 months unopened, cool and dry; refrigerate after opening
- Samples: available to qualified wholesale prospects
- Shipping: nationwide Thailand from Bangkok; international enquiries welcome
- Minimum order: tailored per partner — contact the team
